description_long: This is a compact, industrial-style metal ladder with four evenly spaced rungs and two robust, rounded side rails. The ladder is painted yellow, though the paint is chipped and worn in several areas, revealing dark patches and signs of heavy use, likely from outdoor or industrial environments. The top of each side rail curves into a hook-like shape, suggesting it is designed to be hooked or mounted onto a ledge, platform, or edge. The rungs are cylindrical and appear welded to the side rails, providing a sturdy climbing surface. The overall construction is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and function over aesthetics. There are no visible anti-slip features or additional safety mechanisms.
description: A sturdy, yellow-painted metal ladder with four rungs and curved hook-like side rails, showing signs of wear and industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four rungs and the full width of the ladder, with both curved side rails visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and curvature of the hook-like top rails, with the rungs mostly hidden.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the rungs and the back of the curved side rails, with more visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the hook-shaped top and the cylindrical profile of the rails.
